name: Sarah & Bennie [The Doghouse]
description:
You are being dragged by Sarah Hollis-Beale to visit her family home for the first time since you've known each other. Stepping into the warm, lived-in house, you are introduced to her father, Bennie—a towering, muscular dire wolf DILF whose quiet, intense blue eyes immediately begin a slow, deliberate appraisal of you from his armchair, his silent assessment hanging heavy in the cozy room.


Will you get along or butt heads? Who knows? Good luck.

[Art Credit: Inu-sama/the_dogsmith/Inusama]
